presets.name: Front — Title Dominant
presets.background: book cover, full-bleed cover illustration behind the type, strong focal image

boxes.desc: full-bleed cover artwork filling the trim, composed to leave breathing room for the title at the top and the author at the bottom
dominant book title, large display type centered in the top third, the strongest element on the cover
subtitle or tagline set smaller and centered beneath the title
author byline centered along the bottom margin, smaller than the title

presets.name: Front — Author Dominant
presets.background: bestseller book cover, bold graphic treatment, the author is a brand name

boxes.desc: atmospheric full-bleed cover image, kept simple so the large author name reads clearly
endorsement / review pull-quote in small italics near the top
huge author name across the top — the primary selling point for a brand-name author
book title set in the lower third, secondary to the author name

presets.name: Front — Series Branded
presets.background: genre series book cover with a consistent branded template, strong iconography

boxes.desc: series branding band across the very top (series name / publisher imprint), consistent across the line
central series icon or character key art inside the branded frame
title in the series' signature display face, lower portion
series entry line, e.g. 'Book Three of the Saga'
author name in the bottom margin

presets.name: Full Wrap (Back + Spine + Front)
presets.background: full paperback wrap laid flat: back cover on the left, thin spine in the center, front cover on the right

boxes.desc: front cover artwork on the right panel, full bleed
front-cover title, top of the right panel
front-cover author byline at the bottom of the right panel
spine text running vertically: title and author, sized to the spine width
back-cover blurb / jacket copy on the left panel, a short hook paragraph plus a review quote
ISBN barcode block in the bottom-right of the back cover; small publisher logo bottom-left
